title: FullStory Event
description: A custom event in FullStory representing a server-side or client-side action. Events can be associated with sessions and users, and include custom properties for behavioral analysis.

name.description: The name of the custom event

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the event occurred

user.description: User association for the event. Not accepted if session.id is provided.

properties.description: Custom key-value properties for the event. Supports string, real, integer, boolean, array, and object types. Type suffixes are not required in v2.

schema.description: Optional explicit type declarations for custom event properties

SessionReference.description: Reference to a session for associating the event with a recorded session

id.description: The session identifier to associate the event with

use_most_recent.description: If true, the most recent session within 30 minutes will be used. If no recent session is found and no id is provided, the event is created without a session.

UserReference.description: Reference to a user for associating the event with a specific user
